LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - MR. EMOY INFORMED THE COURT THAT MR. ESCOBAR IS NOT AVAILABLE TO APPEAR IN COURT. THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED IN COURT INCLUDING THE SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE ON JANUARY 11, 2012. THE COURT MADE THE FOLLOWING RULING: PLAINTIFF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE APPLICATION FOR PRE-JUDGMENT WRIT OF POSSESSION IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 21, 2012. THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER REMAINS IN PLACE UNTIL FEBRUARY 21, 2012 AND WILL COVER BOTH VEHICLES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: TEANNA WARD, CSR # 11918.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY TRUST CREDIT UNION'S APPLICATION OF WRIT OF POSSESSION IS GRANTED. BOND TO BE POSTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $8,748.50. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS ARE ENJOINED FROM TRANSFERRING ANY INTEREST BY SALE, PLEDGE OR GRANT OF SECURITY OF INTEREST ON THE 2 VEHICLES; CONCEALING OR OTHERWISE REMOVING THE PROPERTIES IN SUCH MANNER AS TO MAKE IT LESS AVAILABLE FOR SEIZURE BY THE LEVYING OFFICER; IMPAIRING THE VALUE OF THE PROERTIES OR DISPOSING OF THE PROCEEDS FROM THE TRANSFER OF ANY INTEREST IN THE PROPERTIES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW, NOT REPORTED.

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

DEFENDANTS ARE ENJOINED FROM TRANSFERRING ANY INTEREST BY SALE, PLEDGE OR GRANT OF SECURITY OF INTEREST ON THE 2 VEHICLES; CONCEALING OR OTHERWISE REMOVING THE PROPERTIES IN SUCH MANNER AS TO MAKE IT LESS AVAILABLE FOR SEIZURE BY THE LEVYING OFFICER; IMPAIRING THE VALUE OF THE PROERTIES OR DISPOSING OF THE PROCEEDS FROM THE TRANSFER OF ANY INTEREST IN THE PROPERTIES.
